title: Excalibur | Better Archeology Support
description: Rediscover the past through textures forged in the spirit of timeless adventure
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ce7ea05594c68dd38d40e52f03625fbecbc3545.png)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**

*   Reimagined artifacts, fossils, relics and brushes.
*   Retextured User Interface.

**Credits:**

*     Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
*     ruven & Dunkellitch – Creators of _Better Archeology_
*     Frost\_Beer & Nagi – Builders of _[Small Spinosaurus Fossil](curseforge.com/minecraft)_ Structure

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-better-archeology-support)
